subject: ALO
corpus_note: the Gaussian-elimination solution of content/ALO/problems/alo-prob-001.yaml (real corpus; the YAML is a TRACE archetype with x3=0.875, x2=1.8125, x1=1.1875) re-expressed in C++ to exercise the g++/MinGW runner. LANGUAGE != SUBJECT-EXAM-LANGUAGE: the ALO problem's exam_language is null; this tests the C++ runner, not the routing (routing truth is Task 3's).
